question: Create Sequential: Linear(10,5)->ReLU->Linear(5,2). Count parameters() vs named_parameters().
template:
import torch
import torch.nn as nn

model = nn.Sequential(
    nn.Linear(10, 5),
    nn.ReLU(),
    nn.Linear(5, 2)
)
params = list(model.???())
named = list(model.???())
print(f"parameters() count: {len(params)}")
print(f"named_parameters() count: {len(named)}")
